---
title: "Costume Design"
listing: 
    type: grid
    grid-columns: 2
    image-height: 420px
    sort: "date desc"
    date-format: "MMMM YYYY"
    contents:
        - "productions/*.qmd"
page-layout: full
include-in-header:
      text: |
        <style>
        h1.title {
          text-align: center;
          padding: 20px
        }
        </style>
---
